text.name:
A nutritious and long-lasting can of baked beans. Will last two to five years depending on storage conditions.
Hunger: +30 Thirst: +5

A can of tuna. If unopened, it will last two to five years depending on storage conditions.
Hunger: +20

A can of bacon. Smoke flavor added! Fully cooked! Delicious. Unopened, it lasts over 10 years.
Hunger: +35

A bag of long-grained rice, usually consumed when cooked with water. Conveniently packed for easier preparation.
Hunger: +65

A tomato. If we leave the fruit-vegetable debate aside, it is still tasty and edible, either raw, or cooked.
Hunger: +15 Thirst: +5 Max Stack: 3 Ingredient for: Scrambled Eggs with Tomatoes Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork or shovel

An ordinary ripe apple. It is still firm, delicious, and worm-free.
Hunger: +15 Thirst: +5 Max Stack: 3

A fresh banana, rich in potassium.
Hunger: +15 Thirst: +5 Max Stack: 3

A comparatively unhealthy, [cola flavored] beverage, alternative to water - containing carbonated water, sweeteners, flavoring agents, coloring agents and preservatives.
Thirst: +30

A comparatively unhealthy, [lemon-lime flavored] beverage, alternative to water - containing carbonated water, sweeteners, flavoring agents, coloring agents and preservatives.
Thirst: +30

A healthy, [fermented] beverage made from rye bread, tasty and delicious.
Thirst: +50

5.56x45mm NATO intermediate cartridge. Used in select rifles and LMGs.
Chambered in: M4, M16A2, L85, AUG, FAMAS, Mini-14, M249 Max Stack: 50

.45 ACP pistol cartridge. Used in select pistols and SMGs.
Chambered in: FNX, Colt 1911, UMP-45, Vector, Mini-UZI Max Stack: 60

7.62x54mmR full power cartridge. Used in select rifles and LMGs.
Chambered in: Mosin-Nagant, Sawn-off Mosin, SVD, SV-98 Max Stack: 40

7.62x39mm intermediate cartridge. Used in select rifles and LMGs.
Chambered in: SKS, AKM, RPK Max Stack: 50

5.45x39mm intermediate cartridge. Used in select rifles.
Chambered in: AKs-74u, AK-74, AN-94 Max Stack: 50

.357 M revolver cartridge. Used in select pistols, revolvers, and rifles.
Chambered in: Magnum, Desert Eagle, Rossi M92, Sawn-off Rossi M92 Max Stack: 50

12 Gauge buck shell with 5 pellets. Used in shotguns.
Chambered in: IZH-43, Sawn-off IZH-43, Remington, Saiga-12k Max Stack: 30

A roll of sterile gauze bandage. Can be used to directly stop the bleeding.
Apply Time: 2 sec Max Stack: 3

A bag of whole blood [O−] with an IV set ready for transfusion. Single use to replace blood lost due to bleeding.
Health: +50 Immunity: +50 Apply Time: 6 sec

Provides a small radius of bright red light for a brief time. Can be thrown to light up an area and attract zombies when it burns.
Effect Duration: 90 sec Max Stack: 5 Ingredient for: Molotov Cocktail

Fragmentation grenade type used by the Russian forces. It is lethal in a small radius, but can cause serious injuries at medium ranges.
Damage: 1800 Damage per Fragment: 75 Fuse Time: 2 sec Fragments: 24
A common 9V battery, used to power various electronic devices.
A bundle of wood and kindling ready to be assembled. After deploying, can be used up to 3 times, each lasting 3 minutes.

A box of long kitchen safety matches to light a flame on demand. Store in a dry place and keep away from children.
Can light a campfire kit or cigarettes.

"I've drunk whiskey, I feel healthy."
Thirst: +20 Temperature: +40 Ingredient for: Molotov Cocktail

An assortment of torn rags, still... can be used to stop bleeding.
Apply Time: 5 sec Max Stack: 3 Ingredient for: Campfire Kit, Rope

Cranberries can be collected from the berry bushes found throughout the forests. They can be distinguished easily by their red, ripe and juicy berries.
Hunger: +15 Thirst: +15 Max Stack: 5

A bag of saline solution with an IV set ready for transfusion. Used to replace some blood lost due to bleeding.
Health: +25 Immunity: +25 Apply Time: 6 sec

Multi-Vitamin supplements help boost blood to recover health twice as fast.
Immunity: +10 Health Regen: x2 Effect Duration: 60 sec Max Stack: 3

A comparatively unhealthy, [cola flavored] beverage, alternative to water - containing carbonated water, sweeteners, flavoring agents, coloring agents and preservatives.
Thirst: +30

This zucchini is just ripe enough to be eaten raw.
Hunger: +20 Thirst: +20 Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork or shovel

Bell pepper, green variety. Not so spicy and has plenty of nutrients and vitamins, can be used for cooking or eaten raw.
Hunger: +20 Thirst: +5 Max Stack: 3 Ingredient for: Pepper Steak Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork or shovel

A popular citrus fruit, packed with vitamin "C".
Hunger: +15 Thirst: +15 Max Stack: 3

A small disposable heat source. Keeps you warm for a limited time when put into a jacket, pants or vest.
Temperature: +25

A pocket-sized universal sewing kit, comes in handy for patching various clothes.
Can restore 50% durability to clothing and some hats.

A wooden box containing a complete and universal gun-care system.
Can restore 25% durability to firearms.

A firm but flexible long wooden branch from the native ashwood trees.
Ingredient for: Makeshift Fishing Rod, Bow

Multipurpose pieces of wood. Ideal for making arrows, kindling, and barricades. Drops from the native ashwood trees.
Max Stack: 5 Ingredient for: Campfire Kit, Handmade Arrows, Makeshift Backpack, Wooden Fence

A versatile, strong and flexible wide adhesive tape. If it moves and shouldn't, use duct tape.
Can repair 15% durability of clothes. Ingredient for: Makeshift Suppressor

A burlap sack, ideal for shipping and storing stuff. A drawstring closure can be improvised at the top of the bag using a rope.
Ingredient for: Makeshift Backpack, Tarpaulin

A strong rope, used to tie stuff together, be it things or people.
Can be attached to the waist as an accessory to carry an additional melee weapon. Ingredient for: Makeshift Backpack, Bow, Makeshift Fishing Rod

The hunting knife is a specialized tool designed with a slightly curved tip, primarily for field dressing game.
Damage: 14-24 Crit Chance: 10% Block Chance: 5% Attack Speed: 0.8s

A sharp combat knife with a sturdy blade and handle. Great for self-defense, but it has other, more mundane uses as well.
Damage: 15-25 Crit Chance: 15% Block Chance: 5% Attack Speed: 0.8s

A big, heavy, rusted knife. Designed to slash through thick raw meat. It can also crack bones easily. Mostly used by butchers.
Damage: 16-26 Crit Chance: 20% Block Chance: 5% Attack Speed: 0.8s

Morphine prepares your body for "fight or flight" situations by increasing heart rate, blood flow, and alertness.
Immunity: -10 Drug Effect: Temporary invincibility and +20% movement speed Duration: 20 sec (health drops to 10% when effect ends) Max Stack: 3

Broad spectrum antibiotics. Used to treat viral and bacterial infectious diseases and prevents sickness.
Immunity: +10 Drug Effect: Cures and prevents sickness and poisoning for the effect duration Effect Duration: 60 sec Max Stack: 3

The text on the pack says: "A useful variety for outdoor cultivation in even the wet summers! Grow these vigorous, indeterminate plants to produce heavy crops of deep red fruits with a very good flavor".
Uses: 5 Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork, or shovel

The text on the pack says: "A large bell pepper and a great variety for classic bell pepper taste. Bears large fruits with a blocky shape. Usually eaten while green, fruits have a sweet flavor and crunchy texture".
Uses: 5 Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork, or shovel

Everyday newspapers found in homes before the apocalypse. They still contain useful crafts, guides and articles about survival and can be read to gain some experience.
Experience: +50 Ingredient for: Campfire Kit

Its wood, the basic survival material. Can be obtained by chopping up a tree using axes or bladed weapons.
Ingredient for: Campfire Kit, Wooden Fence, Supply Cache, Metal Fence

Wooden sticks carved using knives into finely matched arrows, but they are flimsy.
Damage: 37-63 Max Stack: 10 75% chance to break after firing. Can be loaded into: Bow, Hunting Crossbow

Modern aluminum core composite bolts with high impact.
Damage: 56-94 Max Stack: 10 Will not break after firing. Can be loaded into: Bow, Hunting Crossbow

A metal canister, filled with large volumes of gasoline.
Provides 25% fuel for vehicles, chainsaws, and generators per use

A common reusable plastic bottle. Can be filled with water from water pumps.
Thirst: +12 Uses: 4 Can be filled with water from a pump Can collect rainwater when left on the ground while raining Ingredient for: Makeshift Suppressor

A reusable military grade plastic bottle used by the army and campers. Can be filled with water from water pumps.
Thirst: +25 Uses: 4 Can be filled with water from a pump

Anti-personnel mine. Provides a nasty surprise for anybody unlucky enough to step on it.
Damage: 1800 Damage per Fragment: 75 Fragments: 24 Explodes when triggered by entities other than you and your teammates.

Old-fashioned but functional, this marvel of mechanical engineering can almost snap your leg in half.
Damage: 200 Can be reused again Not triggered by the player

.22 Long rifle rimfire cartridge. Used in small pistols and rifles.
Chambered in: Sporter22, MK II Max Stack: 80

A toolkit containing mechanical tools that can be used for repairing and restoring damaged vehicles.
Can repair 25% durability of vehicles.

A raw chunk of meat from a deer. Tougher, darker meat, it can be quite tasty once prepared.
Hunger: +25 Thirst: +10 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a campfire Ingredient for: Pepper Steak

Raw venison steak roasted over a campfire to succulent perfection.
Hunger: +50 Thirst: +10 Health: +15

A bottle of Nuka-Cola, the flavored soft drink of the post-nuclear world. Warm and flat. Invigorating, refreshing Nukem.
Thirst: +100 Experience: +200 Health Regen: x2 Effect Duration: 60 sec

A straightforward option for a bolt of athletic energy, it combines caffeine, vitamins, and a familiar Mountain Dew taste.
Thirst: +20 Movement Speed: +15% Effect Duration: 20 sec

The text on the pack says: "This is our most popular zucchini. An early, very productive, bushy plant with an open habit. The flesh is delicious, creamy white, tender and firm".
Uses: 5 Can be planted with a pickaxe, pitchfork or shovel

9x19mm Parabellum pistol cartridge. Used in select pistols and SMGs.
Chambered in: Glock, MP5, MAC-10 Max Stack: 60

A roll of gnarly barbed wire made for fencing off walls and barriers.
Deals minor damage and slows enemies by 2 seconds when triggered. Ingredient for: Barbed Wire Baseball Bat

The posterior leg of a rabbit. When cooked provides quite a tasty snack.
Hunger: +25 Thirst: +10 Ingredient for: Pepper Steak 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a campfire

Rabbit leg roasted over a campfire, tender and flavorful.
Hunger: +35 Thirst: +10 Health: +30

Cloudberries can only be found around lakes. Although very healthy, this unusual berry gives off a musky odor.
Hunger: +10 Thirst: +10 Health Regen: x2 Effect Duration: 30 sec Max Stack: 5

Raspberries can be collected from the berry bushes found throughout the forests. These berries are juicy with high water content.
Hunger: +10 Thirst: +20 Max Stack: 5

A device, such as a walkie-talkie, that transmits or receives radio signals. Its current set frequency picks up the faint radio signals of crashed military transports.
Reveals nearby military crash sites Each use consumes 10% battery charge

A standardized rail-mounted, non-magnifying optic with a red dot projected onto the lens.
Spread: -1 Headshot Chance: +5% Fits on: MP5, UMP-45, Vector, AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, M4, M16A2, L85, FN-FAL, RPK, Saiga-12k, Bizon, Groza, VSS, SV-98, Mini-14, AS-VAL, M249, Hunting Crossbow

A 3.5x scope of Soviet manufacture from the WW2 era.
Spread: -2 Headshot Chance: +15% Aiming Distance: +20% Fits on: SKS, Mosin-Nagant, M70, Blaze

A marksman telescopic sight with fixed 4x magnification and ballistic compensation in range from 100m to 1000m.
Spread: -2 Headshot Chance: +15% Aiming Distance: +20% Fits on: AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, RPK, Bizon, Groza, VSS

Advanced Combat Optical Gunsight with 4x magnification level. Attachable to any weapon with a standardized rail system.
Spread: -2 Headshot Chance: +15% Aiming Distance: +20% Fits on: MP5, UMP-45, Vector, M4, M16A2, L85, FN-FAL, SV-98, Mini-14, AS-VAL, M249, Hunting Crossbow

An attachment for the barrel of a firearm that reduces the amount of noise generated by firing. This variant is designed for the 5.45mm caliber.
Suppresses weapon noise Fits on: AKs-74u, AN-94, Ak-74

An attachment for the barrel of a firearm that reduces the amount of noise generated by firing. This variant is designed for the 5.56mm caliber.
Suppresses weapon noise Fits on: M4, M16A2, L85, AUG, M249

A fine-tooth hand saw with a blade held under tension in a frame, used for cutting materials such as metal or plastics.
Can saw down the barrels of certain firearms. Can be crafted: Improvised VOG-25 Grenade (requires VOG-25 Grenade)

Attached on the rifle stock, the bandolier is designed to keep ammunition readily available during hunting and combat.
Reload Speed: +30% Fits on: IZH-43, Remington, SKS, Mosin-Nagant, Rossi M92, M70, Blaze

Meal Ready-to-Eat [MRE], a self-contained, individual field ration intended for use by the military. These rations are designed to provide a complete, balanced meal for one person.
Hunger: +40 Thirst: +40 Each use reduces capacity by 50%

An extendable fishing rod. Highly portable, it makes fishing seem simple.
Used for fishing Each use consumes 10% durability

A piece of rope tied to a stick. This marvelous invention can be surprisingly useful, but it's very flimsy.
Used for fishing Each use consumes 25% durability

A lost yellow case sealed with loot, belongs to a group of neutral survivors.
Items lost by survivors Can be returned to them for goodwill, or kept for yourself

Attached at the end of a magazine, it makes easy work to swap magazines from pouches, pockets or bags.
Reload Speed: +30% Fits on: AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, M4, M16A2, L85, FN-FAL, AUG, RPK, Saiga-12k, Groza, VSS, FAMAS, Mini-14

The choke constricts the muzzle end of the barrel to alter the shot into a concentrated pattern.
Reduces pellet spread for shotguns Fits on: IZH-43, Remington, Saiga-12k

Herring, a small, silvery, forage fish known for its streamlined bodies and iridescent scales.
Hunger: +10 Thirst: +10 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a fire

Salmon, a diverse group of fish known for its migratory patterns, moving between freshwater and saltwater habitats.
Hunger: +35 Thirst: +15 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a fire

Perch are known for having two dorsal fins, one spiny and one soft, and are typically carnivorous bottom-dwellers.
Hunger: +10 Thirst: +10 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a fire

Bass is a popular game fish known for its fighting ability and tasty white flesh.
Hunger: +35 Thirst: +15 50% chance of getting sick after consumption Can be cooked over a fire

A small fish fillet roasted over a campfire for a tasty, decent sized snack.
Hunger: +25 Thirst: +10 Health: +10

A prepared fish fillet seared over the campfire. It's fully-cooked, flaky, tender and filling.
Hunger: +50 Thirst: +10 Health: +10

A mysterious mushroom with unusual properties...
The road ahead is rough

A rifle scope with variable zoom. Factory default zeroed to 200m and manually adjustable to 800m.
Spread: -3 Headshot Chance: +25% Aiming Distance: +50% Fits on: SKS, Mosin-Nagant, SVD, SV-98, M70, Blaze, Mini-14, FN-FAL, AS-VAL, Hunting Crossbow

A directional explosive mine. A convenient label reminds the user to point it toward the enemy.
Damage: 1575 Damage per Fragment: 75 Fragments: 21 Explodes and fires fragments in a specified direction when triggered by anyone except you and your teammates.

9x18mm Makarov pistol round. Used in select pistols and SMGs.
Chambered in: PM, PB, Bizon Max Stack: 60

9x39mm intermediate subsonic cartridge. Used in select rifles.
Chambered in: VSS, Groza Max Stack: 50

An incendiary Molotov cocktail, improvised by attaching a flare to a bottle of good whiskey. It surprisingly does the job.
Creates a lingering flame on impact, damaging creatures

A single-use flare gun loaded with a flare cartridge. When fired, it signals for an air drop supply crate of random tier.
Fires a flare into the sky, calling in an airdrop after 20 seconds Can attract nearby zombies

The specific type of .50 caliber ammunition and its availability in belt-fed configurations can be very based, for the application of gun turrets.
Ammo used in the Humvee's gun turret Can be mounted on the Humvee's machine gun

Charges for the M203 under-barrel grenade launcher. Explodes on impact.
Damage: 540 Damage per Fragment: 45 Fragments: 12 Max Stack: 10 Fired from an M203 Grenade Launcher, explodes dealing massive damage

Charges for the GP-25 under-barrel grenade launcher. Explodes on impact.
Damage: 540 Damage per Fragment: 45 Fragments: 12 Max Stack: 10 Fired from a GP-25 Grenade Launcher, explodes dealing massive damage Can be crafted: Improvised VOG-25 Grenade (requires Hacksaw)

The M203 is a single-shot 40mm, muzzle-loaded, under-barrel grenade launcher designed to attach to a rifle. It's a Western-style design.
Grenade launcher for NATO firearms Can load and fire 40mm grenades Fits on: M4, M16A2, L85, FN-FAL, FAMAS

The GP-25 belongs to the family of Russian grenade launchers that fit on AK assault rifles. It is muzzle-loaded.
Grenade launcher for Warsaw Pact firearms Can load and fire VOG-25 grenades Fits on: AK-74, AKM, AN-94

An IV set along with a sterile blood bag can be used to draw your own blood for a single use in the future.
Use when health is above 50% Transfuses blood into a Blood Bag

The whetstone can be used to sharpen the edges of various bladed weapons and tools.
Sharpens weapons Restores 25% durability to certain melee weapons

A universal tactical forend for AK series weapons.
Greatly reduces recoil when firing Fits on: AK-74, AKM, RPK Can be crafted: Laser AK Grip (requires Laser Sight)

A foregrip for firearms with Picatinny rails.
Greatly reduces recoil when firing Fits on: UMP-45, M4, L85, Vector Can be crafted: Laser Rail Grip (requires Laser Sight)

A map with some markings, contains notes about interesting places, checkpoints, POIs and vehicles on the current island.
A marked map revealing hidden locations on the island Only works on the current island If not used on this island, will disappear from the inventory on the next island

Elderberries are small, dark purple colored black berries, known for their fragrant creamy flavor and rich nutrients. They grow only in swamps.
Hunger: +10 Thirst: +10 Health: +2 Max Stack: 5
A pair of binoculars for scouting distant areas.

The scout handbook provides a comprehensive guide for scouting activities, covering areas like camping, survival skills, first aid, and leadership.
Experience: +200

Burlap sacks rolled into a roll for later use.
Can be crafted: Supply Cache (requires Wood)

A type of medical tape with adhesive properties, can be used to directly stop the bleeding in an instant.
Stops bleeding Use Time: 1 sec Max Stack: 5

A smoke grenade used by western forces. The smoke is colorless and can provide complete cover against enemies.
Creates a smoke screen for 15 seconds, obscuring enemy vision

"Russian cigarettes" filled with a high-nicotine, potent tobacco called makhorka and were popular throughout the Soviet era.
Smoking is harmful to health Temperature: +5 Reputation: +5 when given to survivors Effect: Slows hunger and thirst rate Duration: 30 sec Max Stack: 10

Beer cans usually last 6-9 months at room temperature. The taste is a little off, but is still refreshingly sweet.
Remember, drinking is harmful, consume in moderation Thirst: +20 Temperature: +10

Epoxy glue is a strong, two-part adhesive made from epoxy resin and a hardener.
Repairs most equipment by 25% durability

Composed of plant matter and animal wastes, it is rich in essential nutrients that plants love.
Increases plant growth rate

Laser sights project a laser beam onto a target, aiding in aiming speed and recoil recovery.
Aim Speed and Recoil Recovery: +30% Fits on: UMP-45, Vector, AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, M4, L85, RPK, Mosin-Nagant, SKS, SVD, SV-98, VSS, M70, Saiga-12k, Blaze, Mini-14, AS-VAL Can be crafted: Laser AK Grip (requires AK Grip), Laser Rail Grip (requires Rail Grip)

The lighter creates a flame using a mechanical ignition system, powered by a flint and wheel mechanism.
Can light campfire kits or cigarettes

An officer's keycard. A critical key for managing access to sensitive areas, authorized gear and maintaining security within a military facility.
A keycard of unknown origin, opens special bunker doors Only works on bunkers on the current island

A homemade DIY suppressor that can reduce some firearm noise. It just works.
A makeshift homemade suppressor, slightly reduces weapon noise Fits on: M4, M16A2, L85, AUG, FN-FAL, AKs-74u, AN-94, Ak-74, AKM, FAMAS, Mini-14, M249

A standardized rail-mounted 3.5x magnifier with night vision, made for NATO firearms.
A standardized rail-mounted night vision scope Spread: -2 Headshot Chance: +12% Aiming Distance: +10% Night Vision: +10% Fits on: MP5, UMP-45, Vector, M4, M16A2, L85, FN-FAL, SV-98, Mini-14, AS-VAL, M249

A side-mounted 3.5x magnifier with night vision, suitable for Warsaw Pact firearms.
A side-mounted night vision scope Spread: -2 Headshot Chance: +12% Aiming Distance: +10% Night Vision: +10% Fits on: AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, RPK, Bizon, Groza, VSS, Saiga-12k

A 100-round 5.56x45 dual drum magazine.
Dual 100-round drum magazine for 5.56×45 Fits on: M4, M16A2, AUG

A 75-round 7.62x39 drum magazine.
75-round drum magazine for 7.62×39 Fits on: AKM, RPK

Bon Appétit.
Can bullets even penetrate this? Damage: 25-41 Crit Chance: 40% Block Chance: 35% Attack Speed: 0.9s Can Cook: Fried Egg (requires Egg + Campfire), Scrambled Eggs with Tomatoes (requires Egg + Tomato + Campfire), Pepper Steak (requires Raw Steak/Raw Rabbit/Raw Chicken + Bell Pepper + Campfire)

A form of personal protective equipment (PPE) that protects the wearer from inhaling airborne pollutants and toxic gases.
Uses durability to filter contaminated air Heat: +2 Provides immunity against toxic gas contaminated areas; durability wears constantly in contaminated areas Can be worn as a liner to wear other headgear on top of it Click the empty head slot to unequip it when used as a liner

A close-fitting head covering that protects the head, face and neck, leaving only the eyes or parts of the face exposed.
Heat: +2 Can be worn as a liner to wear other headgear on top of it Click the empty head slot to unequip it when used as a liner

A full-face Soviet gas mask with a frontal mount for filter cartridges. Used to protect from airborne pollutants and contaminated air.
Heat: +1 Uses durability to filter contaminated air Provides immunity against toxic gas; has more durability but wears constantly in contaminated areas Can be worn as a liner to wear other headgear on top of it Click the empty head slot to unequip it when used as a liner

The headgear of choice of the clowning around degenerate island thugs.
When worn, killing neutral survivors or merchants does not reduce reputation Heat: +1 Can be worn as a liner to wear other headgear on top of it Click the empty head slot to unequip it when used as a liner

Originally designed for military use, its good quality quickly brought it to the civilian market.
Melee Block Chance: +5% When worn, looting zombies has no penalty

.308 Winchester full-power cartridge. Used in select rifles.
Chambered in: M70, FN-FAL, Blaze, Sawn-off Blaze, Longhorn Max Stack: 40

A pair of ordinary sneakers.
Standard athletic shoes Movement Speed: +5% May be damaged by stepping in acid

Woodland boots designed for wet environments.
Combat boots designed for wet environments Movement Speed: +5%, ignores swamp slowdown May be damaged by stepping in acid

Designed for soldiers in combat.
Movement Speed: +10%, ignores swamp slowdown Allows holstering a knife May be damaged by stepping in acid

Can be attached as a shoulder accessory to carry an additional primary weapon on your back.
Allows you to holster an additional firearm on your back Click the empty weapon slot to unequip

Activated charcoal tablets that can filter out toxins.
Restores 50% durability to gas masks

Can weld 25% durability of vehicles or metallic equipment.
Repairs vehicles or metal equipment by 25% durability Can reinforce vehicles with metal plates, making them immune to collision damage

A camouflage suit used to completely conceal the wearer in a natural environment.
Activates when durability is above 50%. Grants invisibility when standing still for a short time. Moving or attacking breaks invisibility. Invisible targets cannot be seen.

A mounted underbarrel flashlight for primary weapons, providing illumination at night.
Attaches to firearms or assault helmets, providing a small cone of light at night Fits on: UMP-45, Vector, AKs-74u, Ak-74, AN-94, AKM, M4, L85, RPK, Mosin-Nagant, SKS, SVD, SV-98, VSS, M70, Saiga-12k, Blaze, Mini-14, AS-VAL

A universal front grip and side-mounted laser sight for AK series firearms. Greatly reduces recoil when firing Aim Speed and Recoil Recovery: +30%
Universal foregrip with side-mounted laser for AK series rifles Fits on: AK-74, AKM, RPK

A foregrip and laser sight for firearms with Picatinny rails. Greatly reduces recoil when firing Aim Speed and Recoil Recovery: +30%
Foregrip with laser sight for Picatinny rail-equipped firearms Fits on: UMP-45, Vector, M4, L85

A nimble pistol favored by many. ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ Damage: 21-35 Spread: 6 Aim Speed: 4 Recoil: 9 Run Penalty: 2 Ammo: .45 ACP Mag Capacity: 15 ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ Can be placed in inventory slots.

A tall mountaineering backpack made from hi-tech materials. Spacious but very noticeable.
